languages.text: "Остановит ли это еретиков? Один слух, одна случайность — и новая мерзость поднимет голову на Тассере".

traits.locale_text: "Иллюминаторы, окна, линзы приборов, карты Таро — люди начнут уничтожать все, напоминающее тассерций. Думаю, губернатор этого и добивался. И думаю, он лгал. Но рисковать опасно".
traits.speaker: SolomorneCompanion

languages.text: "But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."
languages.original_text: "Остановит ли это еретиков? Один слух, одна случайность — и новая мерзость поднимет голову на Тассере".

traits.locale_text: "But will it stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."
"But will it stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."
"But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."
"But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."
"But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."
"But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."

languages.text: “但这样真的能阻止那些异端分子吗？只要一个谣言、一场事故，另一场灾难就会在塔瑟拉上演。”
languages.original_text: "But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."

traits.locale_text: “但这样真的能阻止那些异端分子吗？只要一个谣言、一场事故，另一场灾难就会在塔瑟拉上演。”

languages.text: 「しかし、それでは異端者を止めることができるでしょうか？一つの噂が、一つの事件を起こし、また別の忌まわしいことがタッセーラに起こることになるでしょう」
languages.original_text: "But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."

traits.locale_text: 「しかし、それでは異端者を止めることができるでしょうか？一つの噂が、一つの事件を起こし、また別の忌まわしいことがタッセーラに起こることになるでしょう」

languages.text: «¿Pero detendrá eso a los herejes? Un solo rumor, un único accidente bastarán para que otra abominación asome su fea cabeza en Thassera».
languages.original_text: "But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."

traits.locale_text: «¿Pero detendrá eso a los herejes? Un solo rumor, un único accidente bastarán para que otra abominación asome su fea cabeza en Thassera».

languages.text: "Peki ya bu kâfirleri durdurur mu? Tek bir söylenti, tek bir kaza. Thassera'da başka bir garabetin baş göstermesi için bu yeter de artar bile."
languages.original_text: "But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."

traits.locale_text: "Peki ya bu kâfirleri durdurur mu? Tek bir söylenti, tek bir kaza. Thassera'da başka bir garabetin baş göstermesi için bu yeter de artar bile."

languages.text: « Mais cela arrêtera-t-il les hérétiques ? Une seule rumeur ou un simple accident suffiront pour qu'une autre abomination se manifeste sur Thassera. »
languages.original_text: "But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."

traits.locale_text: « Mais cela arrêtera-t-il les hérétiques ? Une seule rumeur ou un simple accident suffiront pour qu'une autre abomination se manifeste sur Thassera. »

languages.text: "Aber wird das die Ketzer aufhalten? Nur ein Gerücht, ein Vorfall wäre nötig, und die nächste Abscheulichkeit erhebt ihren Kopf auf Thassera."
languages.original_text: "But will that stop the heretics? A single rumour, a single accident is all it would take for another abomination to raise its head on Thassera."

traits.locale_text: "Aber wird das die Ketzer aufhalten? Nur ein Gerücht, ein Vorfall wäre nötig, und die nächste Abscheulichkeit erhebt ihren Kopf auf Thassera."
